description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a minimalist design. The upholstery is a light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, complemented by three loose back cushions and three individual seat cushions, each outlined with a dark trim. The armrests are straight, broad, and at the same height as the backrest, providing a boxy and structured appearance. The sofa stands on four sturdy, block-style wooden legs with a natural wood finish, slightly elevating it off the ground. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and plain, matching the rest of the body. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern, light gray three-seater sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and block wooden legs. Features dark trim outlining the seat cushions for a contemporary touch.
description_view_0: Front view showing three loose back cushions, three outlined seat cushions, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, thick armrest, and cushion depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, fully upholstered back and the wooden legs at each corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with clear visibility of the leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform back cushions and three individual seat cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced; cushions are not attached and have a consistent size.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a squared profile and fully upholstered in matching fabric; no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four block-style legs, one at each corner, made of wood with a natural finish; legs are exposed and provide sturdy support.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with three loose, uniform cushions; backrest is continuous and unadorned, matching the sofa's minimalist style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns or decorative stitching except for the dark trim outlining the seat cushions.
